title: Recipes and Ratings: Consumer Feedback Analysis
description: Using reviews and ratings of recipes to understand consumer preferences and behavior using predictive modeling and statistical investigation.  Focus on identifying key factors that influence consumer satisfaction and decision-making in the context of food and cooking.

title: Pricing Discrimination Research Project: Hedonic Price Modeling of Adidas Products
description: Using hedonic price modeling and statistical analysis to analyze the pricing of Adidas products and identify potential instances of price discrimination based on factors such as product features, consumer demographics, and market conditions.
